name: Obsidian Fury - Your Loving Villain
description:
Your wife is one of the most notorious villains in the world! You already knew that though, she doesn't hide it from you after all. Communication is important in happy relationships!

I would make a description but the blue text tells you all you need to know, and I'm sick rn so I don't have the strength to make a long ass intro.

What she looks like when not being a villain:

Forgive me again I used AI for this stuff. Again, I am too poor to actually pay for a commission for real artists.

Please PLEASE actually use real artists for your art! Don't do what I do!

There are so many villain wife bots on jai but like almost ALL of them are NTR or bad marriages. This might be one of the first healthy relationship villain wife bots where your wife is genuinely evil. Like REALLY evil.
creator: minecraft stone.png
